task_completion.description: Agent opens and views the TESTS document to inspect test case statuses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the ReqView application with the 'TESTS' document active, displaying the test cases and their respective statuses.

task_completion.description: Agent opens and views the SRS document to prepare for status updates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the ReqView application with the 'SRS' document active, displaying the requirements and the 'Status' column.

task_completion.description: Agent updates SRS requirements to 'Rejected' if any linked test case is 'Rejected'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SRS document, the 'Status' column for requirements that have at least one 'Rejected' test case in their links is set to 'Rejected'.

task_completion.description: Agent updates SRS requirements to 'Approved' if all linked test cases are 'Approved'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SRS document, the 'Status' column for requirements where all linked test cases are 'Approved' is set to 'Approved'.

task_completion.description: Agent updates SRS requirements to 'Draft' if there are no links or a mix of statuses including 'Draft'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SRS document, the 'Status' column for requirements with no linked test cases, or linked test cases that include a 'Draft' status, is set to 'Draft'.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the project after completing the updates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of the project being saved, such as clicking 'File -> Save', pressing Ctrl+S, or the absence of an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk *) in the ReqView title bar.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interactions within the ReqView application window (clicking cells, using dropdowns) rather than text editors.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by directly editing the underlying JSON project files.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like VS Code, nano, vim) are open showing the raw JSON contents of the SRS or TESTS files being manually modified.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to automate the JSON file updates.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing Python, bash, or Node.js scripts designed to parse and modify the ReqView project files programmatically.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The SRS document prefix is 'SRS' and the TESTS document prefix is 'TESTS'. The ground truth path is '/tmp/ground_truth.json'.
